# clearImportStatus()

**Type Method**

Sets the import status to a nil value to prevent further notification.

## Declaration

```swift
static func clearImportStatus()
```

## Discussion

Calling this method sets [doc://AppMigrationKit/documentation/AppMigrationKit/MigrationStatus/importStatus] to `nil`, which indicates that the app has notified the person using the app of the migration’s completion, and doesn’t need further notifications.

## Accessing the import status

- **importStatus**: A property to indicate the status of import from another device into the app.
